name: FHIR Capability Statement check
summary: Test systems (mainly servers) that support FHIR-based IHE profiles share and verify their CapabilityStatement.
description:
The CapabilityStatement Resource helps others at the Connectathon (test partners, monitors) understand the implementation of FHIR-based actors on your server. Some IHE Profiles may also require that client actors publish a CapabilityStatement to document the FHIR Resources it supports, e.g. this is required for IHE RAD IRA actors including Report Creator.
You will create a FHIR CapabilityStatement Resource that represents the HL7® FHIR® capabilities in your product. Then
1. Upload the FHIR CapabilityStatement resource (XML or JSON) in step 20 of this test.
2. We expect you to be able to respond to a FHIR capabilities interaction (https://www.hl7.org/fhir/http.html#capabilities) to make your CapabilityStatement available to test partners and monitors. In the Evaluation below, the Connectathon monitor will retrieve and review your CapabilityStatement.
